Dior Fall/Winter Miss Dior Retro
Meticulously crafted in black calfskin, featuring a unique letter-pressed logo, exquisite craftsmanship, and a spacious compartment design. Paired with a detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or as a clutch, a daily essential item
